# daytona_api_key (Data Source)

Reads a Daytona API key by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_api_key" "example" {
  name = "api-key-name"
}

output "daytona_api_key_permissions" {
  value = data.daytona_api_key.example.permissions
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) API key name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) API key creation timestamp.
- `expires_at` (String) API key expiration timestamp, when available.
- `id` (String) API key name, used as the object ID.
- `last_used_at` (String) API key last-used timestamp, when available.
- `permissions` (Set of String) Daytona organization resource permissions assigned to the API key.
- `user_id` (String) ID of the user who owns the API key.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Masked API key value.
